description: At Breakpoint 2023, Boba Guys discusses their innovative on-chain loyalty program built on Solana, highlighting their journey from physical punch cards to a digital solution that enhances customer engagement and sustainability.
topic_summary: Boba Guys introduces their next-gen loyalty program on Solana, emphasizing innovation, cost efficiency, and community engagement. They discuss the transition from physical to digital loyalty systems and the advantages of using Solana's technology [t=17:16].
